message:
chore: bump version to 5.1.0 for release

New features since 5.0.7:
- Elixir language support with 16 scan categories
- --exclude-tests flag to suppress findings inside test code

Plus bug fixes (shellcheck cleanups, macOS silent zero-findings,
CI detection, relative path handling in --exclude-tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,7 +28,7 @@ set -Eeuo pipefail
 shopt -s lastpipe || true
 trap '' SIGPIPE 2>/dev/null || true
 
-UBS_VERSION="5.0.7"
+UBS_VERSION="5.1.0"
 REPO_RAW="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master"
 MODULE_PATH_TEMPLATE="$REPO_RAW/modules/ubs-%s.sh"
